name: Low-Rank Attention Residuals
content: Attention Residuals replace the fixed residual sum with depthwise attention over previous sub-layer outputs in large language models (LLMs), but use each output as both a full-dimensional key and value. This couples routing with representation and makes depth-routing scores scale with the hidden width $d$. We propose Low-Rank Attention Residuals (LR-AttnRes), which keep full-dimensional residual values while using $r$-dimensional keys, with $r \ll d$, for routing. Projected LR-AttnRes emits lear
summary: Low-Rank Attention Residuals (LR-AttnRes) 提出了一种新的注意力残差机制，通过使用低秩键值对深度路由进行解耦，从而在保持全维度残差值的同时减少计算复杂度。Sliced LR-AttnRes 则利用每个值的最后 r 维作为路由键，进一步减少了冗余计算。
key_insights: Low-Rank Attention Residuals (LR-AttnRes) 提出了一种新的注意力残差机制，通过使用低秩键值对深度路由进行解耦，从而在保持全维度残差值的同时减少计算复杂度。
Sliced LR-AttnRes 利用了每个值的最后 r 维作为路由键，进一步减少了冗余计算。
研究发现深度路由可以在远小于模型宽度的情况下取得有效效果。
xihe_relevance: 对曦和的潜在价值有待评估
